title: Dashboards widget -how to identify dedicated board element

posts.author: rodieade (Adeline Rodier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,
I am setting up a dashboard connecting to multiple boards which have the same structure across several workspaces. As an example I am collecting issues from issues log - one in each workstream. When creating a widget is there a way to identify as label on the chart the workspace? I’d like to see for example issues by workspace.
Thanks in advance

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Adeline,

This is a great question and great suggestion! I am afraid at this time it isn’t possible to label by workspace - sorry for the setback! I encourage you to submit this as a feature request so our community can add their vote and get this on our roadmap
